title: Delhi High Court questions 1991 ACB raid inside Tis Hazari courtroom during proceedings
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday raised questions over how Anti-Corruption Branch (ACB) officers carried out a raid inside a courtroom “under the nose of the Magistrate” without prior permission. [Ram Prashad v. State of NCT of Delhi]Justice Chandrasekharan Sudha made the observation while allowing an appeal filed by Ram Prashad, a Naib court constable posted at Tis Hazari courts, who had been convicted under the Prevention of Corruption (PC) Act for allegedly accepting ₹150 as illegal gratificati
